description:
An Electron remote client app for uTorrent server


What's Changed
- fix: update general settings icons by @tympanix in #536
- feat: support trasmission labels by @tympanix in #537
- feat: custom styled window title bar by @tympanix in #539
- Parse torrent metadata for upload flows by @tympanix in #540
- feat: add system-following theme preference by @tympanix in #542
- feat: remove torrent files after successful upload by @tympanix in #544
- fix: save window size and fullscreen state by @tympanix in #545
- Apply theme globals to the rendered theme by @tympanix in #546
- Open app window on tray double-click by @tympanix in #548
- Add system startup options to general settings by @tympanix in #550
- Add per-server default upload options by @tympanix in #551
- Fix notification colors for dark theme by @tympanix in #552
- fix(timeouts): standardize bittorrent HTTP timeouts by @tympanix in #553
- feat: support labels for deluge by @tympanix in #557
- Refine torrent client feature discovery and fixture contracts by @tympanix in #558
- feat: show connected server name in the title bar by @tympanix in #560
- chore: update @wdio npm packages by @tympanix in #561
- fix: show torrent progress with fixed tenths precision by @tympanix in #562
- build: remove gulp by @tympanix in #563
- fix: align context menu with cursor position by @tympanix in #564
- fix: ui, macos traffic light position by @tympanix in #568
- fix(theme): add dark subtle shadow token by @tympanix in #570
- fix: preserve selected server when loading settings by @tympanix in #569
- feat: show bittorrent client version by @tympanix in #565
- fix(qbittorrent): preserve free disk space by @tympanix in #571
- chore: remove mock bittorrent client by @tympanix in #572
